38.reason: [Loop condition should be i < i1, not i <= i1, because i1 is the count of terms, and valid indices are 0 to i1-1. Using <= causes out-of-bounds access.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Loop condition should be i < i1, not i <= i1, because i1 is the count of terms, and valid indices are 0 to i1-1. Using <= causes out-of-bounds access.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  // The loop should run from 0 to i1-1, not i1, because i1 was incremented after the last valid input. This causes out-of-bounds access.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: loop should run from 0 to i1-1, not i1. i1 is the count of terms, so valid indices are 0 to i1-1.

40.reason: [Incorrect operation: polynomial multiplication requires adding exponents and multiplying coefficients, but here coefficients (cs1, cs2) are added and exponents (xs1, xs2) are multiplied 鈥 roles are swapped.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect operation: polynomial multiplication requires adding exponents and multiplying coefficients, but here coefficients (cs1, cs2) are added and exponents (xs1, xs2) are multiplied 鈥 roles are swapped.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: cs should store exponents (which are added), but here coefficients are being added. This is swapped logic.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: cs should store exponents (which are added), but here coefficients are being added. This is swapped logic.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  // Coefficients should be multiplied, not added.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: cs should store exponents (sum), but here it's adding coefficients. Also xs stores product of coefficients, but variable names are swapped.

41.reason: [See above: xs arrays hold coefficients, cs arrays hold exponents 鈥 this is a fundamental variable misuse.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: xs should store coefficients (product), but variable naming is confusing and logic is inverted.
